summary: The user is considering changing their daily commute by incorporating cycling into their routine, specifically looking for foldable bikes to take on the train. They have been taking the 7:15 am train from station A to station B every weekday for the past three months and are seeking bike shops near station B that open early in the morning for test rides.
facts: The user has been taking the 7:15 am train from station A to station B every weekday morning for the past 3 months. The user is considering incorporating cycling into their daily commute. The user is looking for foldable bikes that can be taken on the train. The average weight of a foldable bike typically ranges from 20-35 pounds (9-16 kg). The user is interested in bike shops near station B that open by 7:30 am or earlier. The user arrives at station B around 7:45 am. The user is not an avid cyclist but wants to start with a shorter ride from the train station to work, which is about 10-15 minutes. The user is exploring various foldable bike models suitable for beginners.
